title: Spicy Chewy Norwegian Almond Bowl
description: A quick, vegan Norwegian bowl packed with spicy, chewy almond crunch and roasted cauliflower, served over quinoa and chickpeas.
instructions: Toss cauliflower florets with 1 tbsp coconut oil, 1 tbsp smoked paprika, 1 tsp cayenne pepper, 1 tsp ground ginger, and 1/2 tsp sea salt. Place in the air fryer basket.
Air‑fry the cauliflower for 12–15 minutes, shaking halfway, until crisp and golden.
In a small bowl, combine the ground almonds with maple syrup, sesame seeds, and a pinch of salt. Spread the mixture on a parchment‑lined tray.
Air‑fry the almond layer at 350°F (177°C) for 5–7 minutes, shaking halfway, until caramelized and chewy.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked quinoa and chickpeas. Gently fold in the roasted cauliflower.
Transfer the quinoa‑cauliflower mixture to serving bowls.
Top each bowl with the caramelized almond crunch, and optionally drizzle a little extra coconut oil or squeeze lime juice.
Serve immediately for a hot, spicy, chewy Norwegian bowl.
